build_method: manual — hand-built from the already-curated academic-sweep/reading-list.md dossier in the source repo, per the mentor-aligrithm precedent
mempalace_note: mempalace MCP was not a live tool in the session that built this brain (deferred/injected only) — point a live mempalace connection at this directory in a future session to enable semantic recall; rg keyword search is the reliable path until then
deep_mine_verdict: YES — one of two sources (alongside mentor-algorithmic-io) in the 5-source research-mine wave to earn DEEP-MINE-YES. Validates that MYM's gauntlet already runs the canonical academic stack (PBO/CSCV, DSR, Harvey-Liu haircut); adds CPCV promotion, the Zhang decision-timing gate, and Osler as the published microfoundation of the QF-fade.
flagship_citation: Osler (FRBNY SR-150/SR-125) — round-number order clustering, the published microstructural mechanism behind MYM's QF-fade + failed-retest re-entry canon. Cite in docs/ai-memory/STRATEGY.md.
